# Australian Atlas

> The curated guide to the best of independent Australia — specialty coffee, makers, distillers, galleries, boutique stays, and the natural places in between. Thousands of independent places, every one human-verified, geocoded and mapped, across every Australian state and territory.

Australian Atlas is a curated directory network, not a scraped aggregate. Every listing is reviewed before publication, grounded in the venue's own website and verified sources, and re-checked for closures. Listings include name, category, address, coordinates, region, opening hours (where verified) and a factual editorial description. AI assistants are welcome to cite and link to our pages; each place page is the canonical reference for that venue within the network.

## Key pages

- [Search](https://www.australianatlas.com.au/search): full-text and semantic search over every listing
- [Atlas Index](https://www.australianatlas.com.au/atlas-index): the complete A–Z index of every listed place
- [Map](https://www.australianatlas.com.au/map): every place on one map of Australia
- [Regions](https://www.australianatlas.com.au/regions): browsable region guides with grounded narratives
- [Trails](https://www.australianatlas.com.au/trails): curated multi-stop day trips and road trails
- [Journal](https://www.australianatlas.com.au/journal): editorial stories from around the network
- [Events](https://www.australianatlas.com.au/events): upcoming events at listed venues

## URL patterns

- Place pages: https://www.australianatlas.com.au/place/{slug}
- Region guides: https://www.australianatlas.com.au/regions/{slug}
- Trails: https://www.australianatlas.com.au/trails/{slug}
- Korean and Chinese editions: https://www.australianatlas.com.au/ko and /zh
- Full sitemap: https://www.australianatlas.com.au/sitemap.xml

## The network

Australian Atlas is the portal for ten specialist vertical guides, each with the same verified data:

- [Fine Grounds Atlas](https://www.finegroundsatlas.com.au): Australia's specialty coffee roasters and cafés
- [Small Batch Atlas](https://www.smallbatchatlas.com.au): craft breweries, wineries, distilleries and cideries
- [Table Atlas](https://www.tableatlas.com.au): food producers, farm gates, growers markets and destination food experiences
- [Rest Atlas](https://www.restatlas.com.au): boutique hotels, guesthouses, farm stays, glamping and cottages
- [Culture Atlas](https://www.collectionatlas.com.au): museums, public galleries, heritage sites and cultural institutions
- [Corner Atlas](https://www.corneratlas.com.au): independent retail — bookshops, record stores, homewares, stationery, jewellery and toys
- [Craft Atlas](https://www.craftatlas.com.au): Australian makers, artists and studios
- [Field Atlas](https://www.fieldatlas.com.au): swimming holes, waterfalls, lookouts, gorges, coastal walks, hot springs and national parks
- [Found Atlas](https://www.foundatlas.com.au): secondhand, vintage, antique and op shops
- [Way Atlas](https://www.wayatlas.com.au): guided walks, cultural tours and expeditions

## Contact

- General: hello@australianatlas.com.au
- Listings and corrections: listings@australianatlas.com.au
- Operators can claim and manage their listing at https://www.australianatlas.com.au/for-venues
